name: Appliance Repair
title: AI Tools for Appliance Repair Companies | Turnkey AI
meta_description: Custom AI tools for appliance repair — book service calls fast, manage parts and scheduling, and follow up. Built in two weeks, starting at $1,500.
hero_lede: A dead fridge or a broken washer is an urgent call — the customer needs it fixed today. We build the tools that book that call fast and keep your service routes running tight.
drains: Service calls that need fast booking before the customer calls elsewhere
Diagnosing the appliance and likely parts from a phone description
Scheduling that scatters across town with idle time between calls
Customers asking for arrival windows and status updates

tools.title: Service-call assistant
tools.body: Every call and form gets an instant reply, the appliance and symptom captured, the likely fix flagged, and a service window booked — fast, before the customer moves on.

tools.title: Route & schedule filler
tools.body: It books service calls into efficient windows and offers open slots to waiting customers, so technicians run tight routes instead of idling.

tools.title: Arrival-window assistant
tools.body: Customers get a confirmed window, a heads-up before the tech arrives, and a summary after — fewer 'where are you?' calls, more reviews.

tools.title: Morning route brief
tools.body: One text each morning: today's calls in route order, parts to load, and yesterday's numbers.

cases.context: An appliance repair company with scattered scheduling.
cases.before: Technicians ran loose routes with idle time between calls.
cases.after: Calls booked into tight windows; open slots filled from the waitlist.
cases.impact: Representative result: more calls completed per technician per day.

cases.context: A company fielding constant status calls.
cases.before: The office spent the day answering 'when will the tech arrive?'
cases.after: Customers get a confirmed window and an automatic heads-up before arrival.
cases.impact: Representative result: far fewer inbound status calls and a smoother customer experience.

faq.q: Can it identify the appliance problem from a description?
faq.a: It captures the appliance, brand, and symptom and flags the likely fix and parts, so your tech rolls up prepared. It won't replace a diagnosis — it makes the visit more efficient.

faq.q: How does it keep routes tight?
faq.a: It books calls into efficient windows by location and fills open slots from the waitlist, so technicians spend more time fixing and less time driving.

faq.q: Will it work with my scheduling software?
faq.a: Yes. We build on top of whatever dispatch and CRM tools you already use.
